title: cleome chodatiana
intro: Cleome chodatiana, also known as Chodat's beeplant or Chodat's cleome, is a species of flowering plant in the cleome family (Cleomaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Cleome chodatiana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a topical application for skin conditions.
